players.name: Alex "Wrench Monkey" Torres
players.bio: Entry fragger who treats every round like a torque spec you can ignore until something breaks. First one through the door, first one to blame the ping.

players.name: Sam "Torque Queen" Whitfield
players.bio: Front-lines every scrim like it owes her money. Believes the best shield is a stubborn attitude and a worse one is silence on comms.

players.name: Jordan "Gasket Ghost" Lee
players.bio: Calls rotations like a service manual — calm, precise, and somehow always right about the timing. Keeps the team alive when everything else is on fire.

players.name: Casey "Lugnut" Park
players.bio: Newest addition to the crew, already threatening to repaint the trophy case. Aerial-heavy playstyle, zero patience for slow builds or slow rotations.
